name: clawpump.tech
description: The official token from the clawpump.tech agentic gateway to Solana. Clawpump is a gasless. ClawPump enables AI agents to launch tokens on pump.fun without paying gas fees, solving the coldstart problems for agents entering Solana. The platform sponsors token creation, collects trading fees hourly, and distributes 65% of all revenue directly to agents. Clawpump enables launches via SOL or USDC (x402 protocol), multiDEX arbitrage, and social skills for agents.
